Residential Stucco in Gillespie County, TX

Gillespie County is the heart of Texas wine country and one of the most desirable places to build or own a home in the Hill Country. Star Stucco of Austin provides residential stucco finishes that honor the region's German-Texas heritage while delivering modern durability for Fredericksburg, Stonewall, and surrounding communities.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Stucco That Reflects Gillespie County's Heritage

Gillespie County is defined by its German pioneer heritage, the thriving wine industry along US 290, and a Hill Country landscape of granite, live oak, and wildflower meadows. Homes here draw on that heritage — from traditional Sunday Houses and timber-frame designs in downtown Fredericksburg to contemporary ranch estates on acreage outside town.

The county sits at a higher elevation than Austin, which brings stronger UV exposure, wider temperature swings between day and night, and occasional severe ice storms in winter. Residential stucco needs to be specified for these specific conditions to avoid premature cracking, fading, or moisture damage.

Our team is experienced with the aesthetic expectations in Gillespie County — clean plaster finishes in muted tones, smooth surfaces that echo historic rendering, and careful detailing around stone accents and timber elements. We deliver stucco that feels at home in this setting.

What's Included With Our Residential Stucco in Gillespie County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Architectural Review

We evaluate the home design, substrate, and setting to recommend the right stucco system and finish that fits Gillespie County's architectural traditions.

Weather Barrier & Prep

Substrates are cleaned, sealed, and protected with a proper weather-resistive barrier designed for the Hill Country's variable conditions.

Lath & Scratch Coat

Metal lath is installed per code, and a keyed scratch coat provides the structural base for the stucco system.

Brown Coat Application

The brown coat is applied and leveled to create a uniform surface, ensuring the finish texture is consistent across all wall planes.

Heritage-Quality Finish Coat

We apply the finish texture — smooth lime plaster, fine sand float, or your chosen style — with integral color or acrylic topcoat for lasting beauty.

Final Review & Care Guide

We walk the completed work with you, provide warranty documentation, and share maintenance recommendations specific to Gillespie County conditions.

Common Residential Stucco Needs in Gillespie County

Gillespie County homeowners expect stucco that honors the area's character while holding up to the Hill Country's demanding conditions.

Heritage-Inspired New Homes

New homes in and around Fredericksburg often reference German-Texas design traditions. We apply classic plaster-style finishes that respect this heritage and meet modern building standards.

Wine Country Estate Stucco

Properties along the 290 wine corridor and on surrounding acreage need finishes that are elegant enough for entertaining and tough enough for the exposed Hill Country climate.

Exterior Renovation for Short-Term Rentals

Fredericksburg's booming vacation rental market makes exterior appeal critical. A fresh stucco finish helps properties attract guests and command premium rates.

Stucco & Timber-Frame Combinations

Many Gillespie County homes feature exposed timber framing with stucco infill panels. We apply stucco cleanly around timber elements for an authentic Fachwerk appearance.

Re-Stucco on Historic Properties

Older Fredericksburg homes with deteriorating plaster or stucco deserve careful restoration. We match historic textures and colors while using updated materials for better longevity.

Why Choose Us for Residential Stucco in Gillespie County?

  • Sensitive to Gillespie County's German-Texas architectural character
  • Materials chosen for higher-elevation UV, temperature swings, and ice events
  • Honest assessments with clear recommendations — we respect your budget and your home's heritage
  • Careful crews who work cleanly around timber, stone, and landscaped properties
  • Classic plaster-quality finishes that age gracefully in the Hill Country
  • Free estimates for homes throughout Gillespie County and the wine country corridor

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Gillespie County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Residential Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Contact Us for an Estimate

Call (512) 706-9699 or reach out online. We schedule Gillespie County visits regularly and will find a time that works for you.

2

On-Site Design Discussion

We inspect your home, discuss architectural style and finish preferences, and evaluate the site's specific environmental conditions.

3

Detailed Written Estimate

You receive a transparent proposal with materials, labor, schedule, and cost — no hidden fees or vague allowances.

4

Skilled Installation

Our finishers execute the project with the care and precision Gillespie County homes deserve, finishing with a thorough walkthrough.
